extortion.description: LGB founded in 1937 as a Transport Operator is now 84 years young today. LGB has become the first Indian Company to supply Timing Chains to 4 Wheeler OEMs in India and is the largest timing chain exporter from India to the U.S. Today. LGB is the No. 1 OEM supplier of 2 Wheeler Drive Chains, which holds largest market sharing OEM and Replacement market. Today LGB Stands proud as premier manufacturer of Automotive Chains, Sprockets and Chain Tensioners under popular brand name 'ROLON'. LGB also produces world class Fine Blanked Products and Precision Machined Gears and Parts. The company has 20 chain manufacturing plants, all ISO / IATF certifiedcompany is headquartered in 6 / 16 / 13, Krishnarayapuram Road, Ganapathy, Coimbatore - 641 006.2,912 Employees
